shaderPacks.name: Complementary Shaders - Reimagined
shaderPacks.description: Best all-around pack for survival/building: vanilla-faithful, well-optimized, great settings. Recommended default. Works well on Apple Silicon (keep colored/voxel lighting OFF).

shaderPacks.name: BSL Shaders
shaderPacks.description: Bright, colorful, polished and well-optimized full-feature pack. One of the best Apple-Silicon-compatible options.

shaderPacks.name: MakeUp - Ultra Fast
shaderPacks.description: The performance/BTE pick: by far the fastest real shader, ideal for high render distance on large terrain. Lighter visuals than BSL/Complementary. Apple-Silicon friendly.

shaderPacks.name: Sildur's Vibrant Shaders
shaderPacks.description: The most explicitly Mac-tested pack (ships Apple-specific fixes); bright/vibrant with tiered Lite-to-Extreme presets to dial performance.

shaderPacks.name: Complementary Shaders - Unbound
shaderPacks.description: The more stylized Complementary rendering path (alternate to Reimagined). PBR support and many features. Works on Apple Silicon.
